name: Filter Bar
description: Horizontal filter controls with search, dropdowns, date pickers, and active filter chips.

default.description: Horizontal filter controls with search, dropdowns, date pickers, and active filter chips.

slots.active-filters: Chip list showing currently applied filters

toolbar.description: Action toolbar with grouped buttons, toggles, and separator dividers. Used above data tables and content areas for bulk actions and view controls.

slots.separator: Visual Separator between filter and action groups
slots.actions: Grouped action Buttons (add, export, bulk operations)

segmented.description: Filter bar using Segmented control for primary category filtering with search as secondary. Clean toggle-based filtering for views with discrete categories.

slots.segmented: Segmented control for primary filter categories
slots.search: Secondary search Input for keyword filtering

search-primary.description: Search-dominant filter bar where the search input takes most of the width. Filters and actions are secondary controls. Ideal for content-heavy pages and search-first experiences.

slots.search: Full-width search Input with _flex1 taking most of the row

slots.active-filters: Chip list showing currently applied filters
